title: Appropriations
doc_html:
§95.  Appropriations

All appropriations made by the legislature to the Law Library of Louisiana, whether general or special, shall be drawn on the warrant of the Chief Justice of the Supreme Court or any person designated by him.  

Added by Acts 1954, No. 409, §1.
doc_text:
§95.  Appropriations
All appropriations made by the legislature to the Law Library of Louisiana, whether general or special, shall be drawn on the warrant of the Chief Justice of the Supreme Court or any person designated by him.
Added by Acts 1954, No. 409, §1.
